props.name: button
props.description: Create button-like checkboxes and radio buttons.

props.name: falseValue
props.description: Use in conjunction with the v-model directive to specify the value that should be assigned to the bound variable when the checkbox is in the `false` state.

props.name: feedbackValid
props.description: Provide valuable, actionable invalid feedback when using standard HTML form validation which applied two CSS pseudo-classes, `:invalid` and `:valid`.

props.name: hitArea
props.description: Sets hit area to the full area of the component.

props.name: id
props.description: The id global attribute defines an identifier (ID) that must be unique in the whole document.

props.name: inline
props.description: Group checkboxes or radios on the same horizontal row by adding.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Set component validation state to invalid.

props.name: label
props.description: The element represents a caption for a component.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: The default name for a value passed using v-model.

props.name: reverse
props.description: Put checkboxes or radios on the opposite side.

props.name: tooltipFeedback
props.description: Display validation feedback in a styled tooltip.

props.name: trueValue
props.description: Use in conjunction with the v-model directive to specify the value that should be assigned to the bound variable when the checkbox is in the `true` state.

props.name: valid
props.description: Set component validation state to valid.

events.name: change
events.description: Event occurs when the checked value has been changed.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emit the new value whenever there’s a change event.
